_readme: A BookJumpr import batch. Run:  npm run bj -- import inbox/batch.example.json
'books' = metadata records (the books.csv). Each becomes a full book page.
Fields: title (required), author, year (number, 0 if unknown), synopsis.
'mentions' = one book naming another inside its text.
Fields: source (required), mentioned (required), author (of the mentioned book).
Books referenced only by a mention are created automatically (they just wait for a synopsis).
Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the importer, so this note is safe to leave in.

books.title: The Name of the Rose
books.author: Umberto Eco
books.synopsis: A Franciscan friar and his novice investigate a series of deaths in a wealthy medieval Italian abbey, following clues through its labyrinthine library.
